title: lisianthius glandulosus
intro: Lisianthius glandulosus, also known as the hairy lisianthus, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lisianthius glandulosus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
